message:
100% migrate with.zig to builder callback style

- Migrated all builder sections to use b.write/writeFmt/writeIndent
- Migrated all post-flush sections to use self.emit/emitFmt/emitIndent
- Added intermediate flushes before body generation
- captureExpr() bridge for genExpr integration
- 3 flush points: assertRaises body (775), assertRaises return (853), main body (1120)

Pattern:
1. Builder setup (b.write) → flush → body generation (self.emit)
2. assertRaises early return has separate flush
3. Normal with path has separate builder setup → flush → body

Test: bool 140/143, unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 - no regressions
